introSection: Batgirl Coaster Chase is a Vekoma kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was originally named Pied Piper when it opened in 1992. In 1999, it was renamed to Rollschuhcoaster. In 2009, Wiggles World made its debut at the park and the roller coaster was renamed to Romp Bomp A Stomp to suit the new theme.

In 2011, Romp Bomp A Stomp was renamed to Kiddee Koaster after Six Flags got rid of external licenses from its parks. Then in 2020, it was renamed Streamliner Coaster.

For the 2024 season, Thrill Seeker Park became part of the DC Universe area, with the coaster being rethemed to Batgirl and renamed as Batgirl Coaster Chase.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is one of only two 85m Junior Coasters from Vekoma currently in existence. This layout is a simple oval layout.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: White track and red supports. The coaster originally opened with Yellow track and light green supports. This would be repainted to lime green track and hot pink supports when it was rethemed to Romp Bomp A Stomp. Its latest repaint was in 2020, where it received its current scheme.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a roller skate.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Batgirl Coaster Chase on the park's website

fullText:
Batgirl Coaster Chase is a Vekoma kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

The ride was originally named Pied Piper when it opened in 1992. In 1999, it was renamed to Rollschuhcoaster. In 2009, Wiggles World made its debut at the park and the roller coaster was renamed to Romp Bomp A Stomp to suit the new theme.

In 2011, Romp Bomp A Stomp was renamed to Kiddee Koaster after Six Flags got rid of external licenses from its parks. Then in 2020, it was renamed Streamliner Coaster.

For the 2024 season, Thrill Seeker Park became part of the DC Universe area, with the coaster being rethemed to Batgirl and renamed as Batgirl Coaster Chase.

The ride is one of only two 85m Junior Coasters from Vekoma currently in existence. This layout is a simple oval layout.

White track and red supports. The coaster originally opened with Yellow track and light green supports. This would be repainted to lime green track and hot pink supports when it was rethemed to Romp Bomp A Stomp. Its latest repaint was in 2020, where it received its current scheme.

The train is designed to resemble a roller skate.


 * Batgirl Coaster Chase on the park's website
